completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part (desktop application: React/TypeScript frontend + Tauri/Rust runtime)
Found 10 existing documentation/configuration artifacts relevant to project documentation
Analyzed tech stack: Tauri 2 + React 18 + TypeScript + Rust with Zustand state management and xterm-based terminal UI
Conditional analysis complete; documented internal IPC API surface, UI component inventory, architecture, source tree, and development workflow
Source tree documented with renderer/runtime/shared directory annotations and critical entry points
Development, deployment, and contribution guides written from README, CONTRIBUTING, and GitHub Actions workflow analysis
Added generated documentation entry point and reading guidance to AGENTS.md

findings.project_classification: Monolith desktop application using React/TypeScript frontend with Tauri 2 and Rust runtime.
findings.technology_stack: Tauri 2 desktop runtime with React 18 renderer, TypeScript UI, Rust native services, Zustand state management, xterm.js terminal rendering, and GitHub Actions CI/release automation.
findings.conditional_analysis: Internal Tauri invoke/event API documented; UI component inventory captured; development workflow, browser annotation subsystem, persistence model, and runtime managers analyzed from source.
findings.source_tree: Repository structure documented across src/renderer, src/shared, src-tauri, docs, and GitHub Actions workflows with entry points and critical directories identified.
findings.operations: Development, release, updater-signing, PR validation, and AUR publishing flows documented from source and workflow configs.
